supportPage.title: Support tickets
supportPage.subtitle: Open a new ticket or follow up on an existing thread.
supportPage.empty: No tickets yet. Open one if you need a hand.
supportPage.newSubtitle: Tell us what's going on. Please include any error messages, license key prefix, and what you've already tried.
supportPage.fieldBodyPlaceholder: Describe the issue in as much detail as you can.
supportPage.closedHint: This ticket is closed. Open a new ticket if you need to follow up.

supportPage.title: Support inbox
supportPage.subtitle: Contact-form submissions and customer support tickets in one queue.

plansPage.title: Plans
plansPage.subtitle: Pricing tiers used for manual license issuance and Lemon Squeezy checkouts.
plansPage.emptyState: No plans yet. Create one to start selling.
plansPage.secPricingDesc: Display price, default activations, and Lemon Squeezy mapping.
plansPage.secFeaturesDesc: Reorder by re-selecting in the desired order.
plansPage.noFeaturesDefined: No features defined yet — create some in /admin/features.
plansPage.secActiveDesc: Inactive plans stay in the catalog but are hidden from /portal/pricing.
plansPage.toastInUseDesc: Deactivate it instead — historical licenses/orders reference it.
plansPage.deleteConfirm: Delete plan "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

featuresPage.title: Features
featuresPage.subtitle: Bilingual catalog of selling-point bullets attached to plans on /portal/pricing.
featuresPage.emptyState: No features yet. Add a few bullets that describe what each plan unlocks.
featuresPage.deleteConfirmAttached: Delete "{label}"? It will be detached from {n} plan(s).

backupPage.title: Backup & restore
backupPage.subtitle: Download a full snapshot of the portal database, or restore from a previous backup. Stored Postgres backups are still your authoritative recovery path — this UI is for ad-hoc snapshots.
backupPage.exportDesc: Single JSON file with every account, license, order, plan, promo code, audit log, and integration setting. Includes ciphertext for encrypted secrets.
backupPage.importDesc: Upload a backup file produced by this portal. Choose a mode below before restoring.
backupPage.modeMerge: Merge — upsert by id, keep existing rows
backupPage.modeReplace: Replace — wipe everything and reinsert from file
backupPage.warningTitle: Replace mode wipes the entire portal database
backupPage.warningBody: This is irreversible inside the same transaction — if anything fails halfway the rollback restores the pre-import state, but if it succeeds the previous data is gone. Take a fresh export before running a Replace restore.

invitesPage.title: GitHub invites
invitesPage.subtitle: Customer memberships on the source-repo team. Retry failed sends after fixing a typo'd username.

licensesPage.title: All licenses
licensesPage.subtitle: Issue, revoke, and manage activation caps.
licensesPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by key prefix or email
licensesPage.revokeConfirm: Revoke this license? The customer's instance will stop validating on next heartbeat.

licensesNewPage.title: Issue new license
licensesNewPage.subtitle: Manual issuance. Generates a plaintext key shown once.
licensesNewPage.successDesc: This is the only time the plaintext key is shown. Copy it now and send it to the customer.
licensesNewPage.searchPlaceholder: Search customers by email, name, or GitHub username
licensesNewPage.hintUsePlanDefault: Leave blank to use the plan default
licensesNewPage.hintExpiresAt: Leave blank for a perpetual license (standard for one-time purchases).
licensesNewPage.placeholderNotes: VIP customer, comp, bundled with order #X, etc.

ordersPage.title: Purchases
ordersPage.subtitle: All orders, from Lemon Squeezy and manual issuance.
ordersPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by email, LS order number, plan

orderDetailPage.title: Order
orderDetailPage.emptyLicenses: No licenses issued for this order.

usersPage.title: Customers
usersPage.subtitle: Search and manage portal accounts.
usersPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by email, name, GitHub username

userDetailPage.keyTitle: License key — copy now and share with the customer
userDetailPage.keyDesc: This is the only time we'll show the plaintext key. The customer will see the prefix in their dashboard.
userDetailPage.hintMaxActivations: Leave blank to use the plan's default

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Runtime configuration and environment status. Most values are env-driven and require a redeploy to change.
settingsPage.warnPepperMissing: LICENSE_PEPPER is not set — license-key hashing is weakened.
settingsPage.warnPrivateKeyMissing: LICENSE_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY is not set — no certificates can be issued.
settingsPage.warnKeypairMismatch: Public and private license signing keys do not pair — activations will fail verification on the main app.
settingsPage.warnCookieInsecure: NUXT_SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE is not "true" — session cookies missing the Secure flag in production.
settingsPage.keypairExplainer: The public key is also embedded in every shipped Momentfy app as an XOR-shared constant. Regenerating forces every existing customer to re-activate — do not rotate unless absolutely necessary.
settingsPage.regenerateTitle: To regenerate (do not run unless rotating):
settingsPage.integrationsDesc: Lemon Squeezy, GitHub, SMTP — view status and test tokens.

integrationsPage.title: Integrations
integrationsPage.subtitle: External services the Portal talks to. Saved values live in the database; leaving a field blank falls back to the matching environment variable.
integrationsPage.secretSetHint: Saved — leave blank to keep the current secret
integrationsPage.lsTestModeHint: Use Lemon Squeezy's test-mode endpoints; uncheck for live billing.
integrationsPage.fieldTokenHint: PAT with admin:org or fine-grained with Members write.
integrationsPage.smtpUnsetNote: Leaving SMTP unset disables password-reset and post-purchase "your license is ready" emails.
integrationsPage.pepperDesc: Extra secret folded into the SHA-256 hash of every issued key. Treat it like an encryption key: rotating makes every existing key unrecognisable. Required in production. Stays in the .env — not editable here.

promoCodesPage.title: Promo codes
promoCodesPage.subtitle: Discount codes redeemable at checkout. Inactive or expired codes are rejected by the validator.
promoCodesPage.secCodeDesc: The code customers type at checkout and the percentage off the displayed price.
promoCodesPage.secLimitsDesc: Cap how many redemptions are allowed and when the code stops working.
promoCodesPage.secNotesDesc: Internal context (campaign name, partner) and whether the code is currently live.
promoCodesPage.toastInUseDesc: Deactivate instead — orders reference this code.

brandPanel.headline: The operating system for booking businesses.
brandPanel.tagline: Own the code. Scale without limits. Pay once, use forever.

errors.EMAIL_TAKEN: An account with this email already exists
errors.ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED: Your account has been deactivated. Contact support to reactivate it.
errors.INVALID_RESET_LINK: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts — please wait a moment and try again
errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.

successToasts.accountCreatedDesc: Welcome to Momentfy. Buy a license whenever you're ready.
successToasts.passwordUpdatedDesc: Sign in with your new password to continue.
successToasts.resetEmailSentDesc: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Welcome back. Manage your licenses and source-code access.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: It's free to sign up. Buy a license whenever you're ready.
register.githubHint: Optional now — required before we can give you repo access

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: We'll email you a link to set a new one.
forgot.sentBody: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose something memorable but strong.
reset.doneBody: Password updated. You can sign in now.
reset.tokenMissing: This link is missing a token. Open the link from your reset email.
reset.missingTokenDesc: Open the reset link from your email.

dashboardLicenses.intro: Manage your Momentfy licenses, source-code access and billing.
dashboardLicenses.emptyHint: After you complete checkout, your license and repo invite will show up here.
dashboardLicenses.purchasedToastDesc: Your license is being provisioned — this takes a few seconds. We also emailed the key to you.

dashboardLicenseDetail.newKeyHeading: Your new license key — copy it now
dashboardLicenseDetail.newKeyExplain: This is the only time we'll show it. Store it somewhere safe. The previous key has stopped working; every existing install must re-activate with this new key.
dashboardLicenseDetail.rotateExplain: Use this if you lost your key or believe it has leaked. The new key is shown once — copy it immediately. The old key stops working at once, and every existing install must re-activate with the new key.
dashboardLicenseDetail.whereIsKey: Where is my full license key?
dashboardLicenseDetail.wherePara1Lead: For security, we only ever show the full key
dashboardLicenseDetail.wherePara1Tail: . After that, the portal only stores a one-way hash, so nobody (not even us) can recover the original plaintext.
dashboardLicenseDetail.whereYouCanFind: You can find your key in:
dashboardLicenseDetail.whereInEmailTail: sent when your order was completed (subject:
dashboardLicenseDetail.whereInPasswordManager: The password manager you saved it to at checkout.
dashboardLicenseDetail.whereInInstallerTail: where you originally pasted it — the saved certificate file on that machine proves activation, even without the key.
dashboardLicenseDetail.whereLostLead: If you genuinely lost the key and need to install on a new machine, use
dashboardLicenseDetail.whereLostTail: above. It generates a fresh key and invalidates the old one.
dashboardLicenseDetail.noInstallsHint: Activate this key on a Momentfy instance to see it here.

dashboardProfile.title: Profile
dashboardProfile.subtitle: Your name, GitHub username, and password.
dashboardProfile.githubHint: Required for source-repo access. We'll invite you to the customers team automatically.
dashboardProfile.inviteAddedDesc: We've added you to the customers team.
dashboardProfile.inviteSentInstructions: Check your GitHub notifications and accept the team invite. We'll mark this as ACCEPTED on the next poll.
dashboardProfile.noInviteYet: No invite yet. We'll send one automatically once you have an active license.
